summary: Frontend-only testing of slide editor UX refactor at /dashboard/create. All features working correctly: context-aware floating panel, element selection with dashed indigo outline, click-outside/ESC to close panel, real-time style updates. Fixed minor bug where CTA shape borderRadius was being overridden by selection outline.

fixed_during_testing.issue: CTA shape borderRadius was being overridden by selection outline's borderRadius: 8
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added preserveBorderRadius parameter to selOutline function, used for CTA element

passed_tests: Page loads with demo user from localStorage
Editor panel [data-testid=editor-panel] NOT visible before any element selection
Click title [data-testid=slide-editable-title] → panel opens with [data-testid=title-style-section]
Title controls present: title-input, title-font-size, title-weight-600/700/800, title-align-left/center/right, title-color-0..7, title-color-picker
Click body [data-testid=slide-editable-body] → panel switches to [data-testid=body-style-section]
Only one element active at a time (title-style-section hidden when body selected)
Body controls present: body-input, body-font-size, body-line-height, body-letter-spacing, body-align-*, body-color-*
Navigate to slide 6 (CTA slide) via thumb-5
Click tagline → [data-testid=tagline-style-section] visible with tagline-input, tagline-font-size, tagline-align-*, tagline-color-*
Click CTA → [data-testid=cta-style-section] visible with cta-input, cta-shape-pill/square/underline, cta-bg-*, cta-text-*

Click background (slide preview) → [data-testid=background-style-section] visible with palette options, bg-color-picker, bg-clear-color, bg-solid/gradient/grain, bg-texture-none/dots/grid/lines, upload-btn, logo-btn
Click outside canvas (canvas-surface) → panel closes
Press ESC key → panel closes
Title text change in title-input propagates to slide preview in real-time
title-font-size slider changes font size on slide-editable-title (96px → 60px verified)
title-align-center sets text-align: center on preview
body-line-height slider changes line-height (1.55 → 1.8 verified)
cta-shape-pill sets borderRadius: 999px
cta-shape-square sets borderRadius: 12px
cta-shape-underline sets transparent background with border-bottom
bg-color-picker interaction works
AI Actions accessible when title/body selected: ai-improve, ai-viral, regen-slide visible
Export accordion [data-testid=accordion-export] accessible in panel
Selection outline on selected element: '2px dashed #6366f1' with outlineOffset: 4px and soft glow boxShadow
critical_code_review_comments: Context-aware panel implementation is clean - uses selectedEl state to conditionally render appropriate style sections
Selection visual (2px dashed #6366f1 with soft glow) is well-implemented in selOutline function
ESC key handling properly clears selection even when input/textarea is focused
Real-time style updates work correctly via updateActive function
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for comprehensive test coverage
seed_data_creation: None needed - uses localStorage demo auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slide editor UX refactor is complete and working. The floating context-aware panel opens on element selection (title/body/tagline/cta/background) and closes on click-outside or ESC. Selection visual is 2px dashed indigo (#6366f1) with soft glow. All style controls work correctly. Fixed minor bug where CTA shape borderRadius was being overridden by selection outline. Image-style-section only appears when an image element is selected (requires applying an image first).
screenshots: .screenshots/01_initial_no_panel.png - Initial state with no panel visible
.screenshots/08_title_styled.png - Title with font size and alignment changed
.screenshots/cta_shapes_fixed.png - CTA shapes working correctly after fix
